description: Locked golden input fixture for v0.1.0 MVP. Five logical-qubit signals spanning the d=3 to d=12 axis-1 anchor range, plus the GRI 2024 baseline row. Per plan section G and CLAUDE.md section 4, this fixture is hash-locked: any drift triggers CI fail. Edits must be a CHANGELOG entry.

gri_baseline.label: GRI 2024 - median CRQC arrival ~ 2034
gri_baseline.source: Global Risk Institute, Quantum Threat Timeline 2024

signals.title: Distance-3 surface code logical qubit demonstration
signals.summary: Small-scale distance-3 surface code logical qubit with measured threshold crossing on superconducting hardware.

signals.title: Distance-5 surface code with logical error suppression
signals.summary: Distance-5 surface code logical qubit; logical error rate below physical error rate threshold.

signals.title: Distance-7 surface code logical qubit demonstration
signals.summary: Small-scale fault-tolerant logical qubit at distance 7 with sustained suppression across multiple syndrome rounds.

signals.title: Distance-11 surface code with sustained logical lifetime
signals.summary: Surface code logical qubit at distance 11; logical lifetime exceeds physical T1 by 30x on superconducting hardware.

signals.title: Twelve logical qubits with shared magic state factory
signals.summary: Twelve fault-tolerant logical qubits at low logical error rate sharing a single magic state factory.
